examples: Even in the dim light the equipment looked old and timeworn.
It is not some timeworn practice integral to the games.
Although the content of "eight part essay" is timeworn, the form and layout can be used for reference.
The result is a new book that looks timeworn and, dare I say it, precious.
Tell that to the timeworn tokens of Monopoly: the shoe, top hat, wheelbarrow, clothes iron, battleship, race car, thimble and Scottie dog.
